task:
Implement the SpongeJIT LuaCompile rewrite plan from `experiments/lua_interpreter_vm/spongejit/ssa_asdl/REWRITE_PLAN.md`.

Use the documented implementation folder name `experiments/lua_interpreter_vm/spongejit/lua_compile/` and the ASDL-derived file naming scheme already written in the plan. Do not introduce `ssa2` or any versioned/new-style folder name.

Create the planned LuaCompile module organization and enough implementation to make the new ASDL/bootstrap and pipeline skeleton real: schema loading/constructors, validation scaffolding, source/evidence/semantic/NF/contract/LalinOut module boundaries, top-level facade, and corresponding tests named `test_spongejit_lua_compile_*`.

Respect the architecture decisions in the workflow and docs:
- full rewrite, no backward compatibility
- no old SponDesc/descriptors/bank/materializer adapters
- old code is historical only
- Lalin/PVM ASDL is the architecture
- LuaSem consumes opcode meaning
- LuaNF owns equivalence
- physical residency is not semantic identity
- runtime/LalinOut must not rediscover Lua opcode meaning
- unsupported cases are structured rejections, not fallback helpers

Keep the implementation faithful to the ASDL schema in `experiments/lua_interpreter_vm/spongejit/ssa_asdl/spongejit_lua_ssa.asdl`. Run focused tests if possible and report files changed plus verification.
